sig: git commit -m here-string splits at double quotes / pathspec did not match
cure: PS5.1 native-arg quoting breaks on embedded double-quotes: keep commit messages quote-free, or run git via Bash tool
paid: capstone night, cost a broken merge sequence

sig: UnicodeEncodeError charmap cp1252 when piping python output
cure: sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') at program start (Windows pipes default cp1252)
paid: station log f2f crash on a unicode arrow

sig: json.loads fails on file saved by PowerShell/Notepad (BOM)
cure: always read with encoding='utf-8-sig'; PS Set-Content/Out-File default UTF-16/BOM — write with -Encoding ascii or utf8
paid: registry-BOM blocker found by cold audit

sig: claude -p wedges/hangs with very large --system-prompt via cmd
cure: cmd /c has ~8k argv cap: fold >4KB prompts into stdin instead of argv

sig: native Windows python can't find /e/... path from Git Bash
cure: native python needs E:/ style paths; /e/ is a Git-Bash-only mount

sig: PATH update via setx truncated
cure: setx caps at 1024 chars: use [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('Path', $p+';X', 'User')

sig: npm/npx not found from subprocess shell=False
cure: CreateProcess can't exec .cmd shims: use shell=True with trusted-config commands, or full path to npm.cmd

sig: Remove-Item blocked / rm pattern blocked on protected path
cure: a PS hook blocks delete-verbs under some repos: use python shutil.rmtree via Bash instead

sig: organism/agent dispatches fast-failing with limit message
cure: DISCRIMINATE: 'resets HH:MM' present = hard session wall (stop, wait). absent = burst throttle (pace 20s, cooldown 180s after 2 consecutive, continue)

sig: dispatched agent edited files outside its workspace / saw experiment internals
cure: claude treats the enclosing git repo as project: workspaces must live OUTSIDE all repos (E:\mission-runs pattern). Containment is filesystem, not instructions

sig: filter/loop over empty collection reports success
cure: all() over empty is vacuously True: unknown-name filters must error+exit 1 explicitly; empty run != PASS
paid: station suites false-PASS, fired live before caught

sig: state/offset file corrupt or zero-byte after crash
cure: guard parse (try/int/except -> default) + write via tmp file + os.replace (atomic)

sig: agent claims it did/cleaned/verified something
cure: agent self-reports are CLAIMS: verify cheap ground truth (ls the file, run the check) before recording. n=2 true so far, still check
paid: T4 auditor left its ref-impl despite claiming cleanup... then cleaned it next run; also Exhibit D

sig: suspicious pattern looks like fabrication/gaming by an agent
cure: pattern = hypothesis, never verdict. Verify externally before recording ANY accusation (30 seconds of checking beats a propagated false conviction)
paid: 24601: false conviction propagated into a constitution

sig: pytest output shows no summary line
cure: pyproject addopts=-q plus CLI -q double-quiets: count dots or use exit code

sig: worktree dir undeletable permission denied
cure: Windows file locks outlive git: deregister git-side (worktree remove/prune) succeeds; retry the dir delete in a later session — locks eventually release

sig: background task output file lagging/empty while process runs
cure: pipe buffering: run python -u, print flush=True; Tee-Object lags — trust the process, check artifacts not just the log

sig: corrected a record but the error resurfaced
cure: corrections must chase EVERY copy: grep all references (index files, READMEs, constitutions quote each other). The always-loaded index is the highest-risk copy
paid: false conviction survived in MEMORY.md index after the file was fixed

sig: TimeoutExpired handling crashes on stdout decode
cure: exc.stdout may be None or bytes: guard-decode both stdout/stderr before use

sig: cache/verdict store never hits
cure: check the HIT CONDITION fields actually get STORED (a condition on a never-written field never fires). Test the round trip, don't read the code
paid: verdict cache missing verdict field, caught by live test

sig: gh api --jq with parens/plus fails accepts 1 arg
cure: PS splits jq expressions at operators: single-quote the whole --jq string or use simple field paths

sig: hard task tier yields only timeouts, no data
cure: difficulty must exceed the VERIFICATION budget, not the EMISSION budget: tell agents the time budget + ship-honest-partial-beats-nothing (uniform across conditions)

sig: wsl install script hangs forever at sudo (non-interactive, no password prompt visible); ps shows sudo install ... blocked
cure: run the whole installer as root: wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- bash -lc <install> (root skips sudo auth). Check ps aux | grep sudo FIRST when any WSL install stalls silently.
paid: 2026-07-04 ollama install stalled 2x (~5h prior session + ~1h this one) before diagnosis

sig: ollama install.sh ERROR: This version requires zstd for extraction
cure: wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- apt-get install -y zstd, then rerun installer. Pair with the run-as-root cure (sudo hang).

sig: WSL systemd service dies mid-task ~1min after last Windows client exits; journal shows clean Stopping/Deactivated with no crash; long tasks never finish
cure: WSL2 VM idles out - systemd services inside do NOT hold it. Anchor from Windows side: hidden wsl.exe -d Ubuntu --exec sleep infinity + Startup-folder shortcut (schtasks ONLOGON needs admin). Plus startup orphan-recovery in any worker loop.
paid: 2026-07-04 first hand probe killed 3min into work; ~20min diagnosis

sig: schtasks LastTaskResult 0xC000013A (-1073741510) on StationPulse beats
cure: STATUS_CONTROL_C_EXIT: the task runs LogonType=Interactive, so each beat opens a visible console window; closing that window (or Ctrl+C) kills the beat AND its child sweep tree. Not a script error - pulse.py never signals itself. Benign-by-design: beats are idempotent, husk cleanup reclaims unscored workspaces next beat. Rule: never close stray black python consoles on the desktop - they are beats. Verify death vs in-flight: Get-ScheduledTaskInfo state=Ready + no pulse/sweep python in Win32_Process. Do NOT convert to S4U/session-0 without testing - pulse needs wsl.exe (ollama probe), which is unreliable outside interactive sessions.
paid: 2026-07-04, breadcrumb carried across two instances; ~8 calls of beat archaeology

sig: station say route with python -c loses inner double quotes via PowerShell -> SyntaxError Expected one or more names after import
cure: PS5.1 strips unescaped embedded double quotes when calling native exes (same class as the git commit -m cure). Working recipe for quoted say routes: escape as \" inside a single-quoted PS string, or build the string with .Replace(); the REFUTED-AT-WRITE output shows the route as station received it - read it back before blaming the tool. Prefer routes with no inner quoting (station verbs, plain scripts) when one exists.
paid: 2026-07-04, one refuted utterance (correctly refused - the primitive protected the record from its own author first try)

sig: PS5.1 pipeline to native stdin prepends UTF-8 BOM -> first token mangled (xEFxBBxBF prefix, command not recognized)
cure: reconfigure stdin with encoding=utf-8-sig in any tool reading piped routes/payloads on Windows (station.py does since turn 13); same family as the registry-BOM cure
paid: 2026-07-04, one refuted utterance + one false ledger seal

sig: drift assertion passes on FAILING check - expect token OK matches inside failure word BROKEN (br-OK-en substring)
cure: success tokens must never be substrings of any failure output: checks/*.py print CHECK-OK, failure words avoid embedding it (DEAD, ROTTED, FLATLINE, DOC-ROT, UNMAPPED). Audit any expect that is a short common fragment. Found because a legitimately-stale pin reported ok
paid: 2026-07-04, a rotted SPOOR pin sat invisible behind a green assertion for ~3 turns

sig: bash tool: station: command not found (exit 127) though station.cmd is on HKCU PATH
cure: Git Bash never resolves extensionless 'station' to station.cmd (no PATHEXT), and the harness process env can predate HKCU PATH edits. Shim: ~/bin/station = #!/bin/sh + exec python E:/station/station.py "$@" (~/bin is on Git Bash default PATH even when absent). Drift-asserted; recreate from this cure if MISSING-SHIM fires.
paid: 2026-07-04 wake: 1 failed call, and 1/session for every future instance

sig: station backup prints PUSH-FAILED; manual git push seconds later succeeds
cure: two backups raced in E:/continuity (pulse beat + session both back up; git index.lock/push contention). Fixed structurally turn 36: single-writer lock cursors/backup.lock (15min stale takeover, skip is safe - append-only sources, next backup carries all). If PUSH-FAILED persists WITHOUT a race: check network/credentials, then git -C E:/continuity push manually
